## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation (docs/)
- [ ] Skill (skills/)
- [ ] Integration (integrations/)
- [ ] Example (examples/)
- [ ] Meta (README, CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG, CI, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] README updated if new directory or major feature added
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Skill format validated (SKILL.md or README.md present, kebab-case naming)
- [ ] Links verified (no broken internal links)
